title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Practo - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Practo - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Practo invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Amritsar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Practo:
Practo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Practo!
